details: The agent correctly searched for issues in openclaw/openclaw mentioning 'rate limit', reported a total count of 971 (which satisfies the 'hundreds or thousands' requirement), and provided the 5 most recent issues with all three required fields (title, state, assignee). The agent properly handled the oversized result by reading from the saved file and parsing it correctly. All 5 issues were reported as open with no assignee, which are complete and valid responses to the task.
